overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing vehicle driving through a stormy industrial desert. The player navigates from a muddy industrial yard onto train tracks, passes a stationary yellow train car, continues through open desert with power lines and billboards, then veers off onto rough off-road terrain. The scene features heavy rain, dystopian industrial structures, and sparse desert vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy industrial yard with scattered warehouses

events.description: vehicle drives from muddy industrial yard onto raised train tracks
vehicle turns left to align with the railway tracks

agents.ego_description: navigating through a muddy industrial area and mounting the train tracks

entered.detail: large concrete industrial structures with metal roofing
metal fencing running along the left side of the yard
raised metal train tracks with gravel bed
blue and red cargo containers stacked near buildings
tall metal pylons with high voltage lines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a muddy industrial yard during a heavy rainstorm. The vehicle drives forward through puddles and mud, passing chain-link fences and industrial warehouses. Around 5 seconds, the vehicle mounts a set of train tracks and continues along the railway line, with shipping containers and power towers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert railway line with power infrastructure

events.description: approaching and passing a stationary yellow train car on the tracks
moving from industrial area into open desert landscape with Joshua trees

agents.ego_description: speeding along train tracks and passing a stationary yellow train car

entered.detail: stationary yellow locomotive parked on the tracks ahead
tall desert trees with spiky branches lining the horizon

segments.scene_description: The vehicle speeds along the railway tracks through an open desert environment. A stationary yellow train car appears ahead and is passed around the 18-second mark. The industrial buildings fade behind as Joshua trees and desert scrub become visible on the sides, with power transmission towers running parallel to the tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert railway with advertising billboards

events.description: billboards become visible along the right side of the tracks
vehicle slows and begins turning right to leave the tracks

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed along straight desert tracks, passing billboards

entered.detail: large advertising signs on metal frames beside the railway
reddish rocky outcrops and cliffs on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the straight railway tracks through open desert terrain. Billboards appear on the right side around 35 seconds, and rocky hills become visible on the left. The power lines recede into the distance as the vehicle approaches a turn-off point, eventually slowing and beginning to exit the tracks around 45 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: rough desert off-road terrain with rocks

events.description: vehicle leaves train tracks and drives onto unpaved desert terrain
vehicle navigates rocky uphill terrain and winding dirt paths

agents.ego_description: driving off-road through rough desert terrain, navigating around rocks and bushes

entered.detail: boulders and rock formations scattered across the desert floor
raised earth and sand piles along the path

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns off the railway tracks onto rough desert terrain, kicking up mud and dirt. The driving surface becomes uneven and rocky, with the vehicle navigating around large boulders and desert scrub. The landscape features winding dirt paths, rocky outcrops, and sparse vegetation as the vehicle continues deeper into the desert away from the industrial infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial yard into a vast, rain-swept desert landscape. It begins by driving through a muddy yard during a heavy rainstorm, splashing through puddles and passing chain-link fences and warehouses. As the vehicle mounts a set of train tracks, the scene opens up to reveal shipping containers and power towers against a stormy sky. The camera then speeds along the railway line, passing a stationary yellow train car as the industrial buildings fade into the distance. Finally, the environment shifts entirely to an open desert, where power transmission towers run parallel to the tracks amidst scattered Joshua trees and desert scrub.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle transitions from a structured industrial railway into the rugged, untamed expanse of a stormy desert. It begins by speeding along straight railway tracks through open terrain, passing billboards on the right and rocky hills on the left while power lines recede into the distance. As the vehicle approaches a turn-off point, it slows and veers away from the tracks, shifting the surface from smooth rails to uneven mud and dirt. The scene then expands into a wilder landscape where the camera navigates around large boulders and desert scrub, kicking up debris from the rocky ground. Finally, the path winds deeper into the desert, moving further away from the industrial infrastructure toward isolated rocky outcrops and sparse vegetation.
